陳奕迅 Eason Chan

Since the year of 2012, “eason and the duo band” has been putting the pieces together.

Each one of us contributes in writing a song with one's very own unique character to produce a wide-ranging colourful album, to celebrate such wonderful times we have spent together;

We call it - L.O.V.E.

從2012年起，“eason and the duo band”就開始著手將這專輯的各部份拼凑在一起。

這張色彩繽紛的專輯集合了每位成員親自打造的作品，而每首歌曲亦充滿了各人的個人特色及對duo band的感情。

這張專輯不僅是我們的傾力之作，亦同樣記錄著我們一起度過的美好時光。

我們稱它為…L.O.V.E.
